checks.name: Lock identifier and phase
checks.details: lock_id is P1-SPEC-LOCK-001 and phase is P1.

checks.name: Approved spec root binding
checks.details: root_sha256 equals the approved P1 spec input root.

checks.name: Phase review decision binding
checks.details: review_decision_hash equals the phase-level review decision file hash.

checks.name: Tool identity binding
checks.details: created_by_tool.sha256 equals the current tooling/create_spec_lock.py hash.

checks.name: Schema minimum validation
checks.details: The generated lock contains lock_id, phase, root_sha256, files, and review_decision_hash.

remaining_followups: Promotion module is still absent and should be handled before automated promotion workflows.
Implementation workpacks need an explicit next-stage authorization policy.
